codeReview.summary: The current HEAD implementation satisfies the live catalog/pool behavior, but the reviewed feature commit does not itself fulfill the feature contract. Commit 6efb253 only changed the DeFiLlama provider tests and masked the compare-coingecko regression by raising the test timeout; it did not contain the route wiring or route tests needed to prove/implement VAL-ONC-003/004/008/009. That work lives on current HEAD from later follow-up commits. As scoped to the assigned feature commit(s), this feature should fail scrutiny for incomplete commit contents and timeout masking.

issues.description: The feature fixed the compare-coingecko regression by increasing the summary test timeout to 15000ms instead of removing the redundant live-fetch cost. The task explicitly required a safe caching/stubbing fix so the suite would be green without removing live behavior, not timeout masking.

The reviewed commit only touches provider fallback behavior; it does not include the `/onchain/networks`, `/onchain/networks/:network/dexes`, or `/onchain/networks/eth/pools*` route wiring and tests needed for the feature contract. The live catalog expansion and pool list/detail implementation being reviewed exist on current HEAD in `src/modules/onchain.ts` and `tests/app.test.ts`, but they are absent from commit `6efb253`, so the handoff commit does not actually contain the claimed feature implementation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker followed the onchain skill mechanically, but the skill does not explicitly warn against satisfying performance regressions by relaxing test timeouts. That gap allowed the feature to pass with timeout masking even though the mission/task text forbade it.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/onchain-api-worker/SKILL.md` requires targeted tests and broader validation but has no guidance against timeout-padding; transcript/handoff for session `021542ad-64ee-454c-8cc2-3c7bf9f492ae` says it 'extended the compare-coingecko summary timeout', and commit `6efb253` changes `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts:1176` to `}, 15000);`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: DeFiLlama research documents the yield-pool contract as `/pools` served from `yields.llama.fi`, but the runtime provider now uses `/yields/pools` on the main API host. The shared research/knowledge is stale relative to implementation and could mislead future workers reviewing provider contract behavior.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/research/onchain-data-sources.md` says 'GET /pools (served from yields.llama.fi/pools)', while current runtime code in `src/providers/defillama.ts:154-163` calls `fetchJson('/yields/pools', ...)` and later follow-up work had to add a dedicated feature (`fix-defillama-yields-endpoint-contract`) to reconcile provider contract expectations.

summary: Reviewed mission docs, AGENTS, feature metadata, worker handoff/transcript, skill guidance, feature commit `6efb253`, and current HEAD route/tests. Current HEAD now demonstrates the live onchain catalog/pool behavior, but the reviewed feature commit itself is incomplete and masks the compare regression with a raised timeout, so this feature fails scrutiny.
